SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa

Class PersistenceUnitInfoImpl

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.PersistenceUnitInfoImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.persistence.spi.PersistenceUnitInfo
public class PersistenceUnitInfoImpl extends Object implements jakarta.persistence.spi.PersistenceUnitInfo
Platform provided persistence unit info.

During bootstrap, the LitePersistenceProvider class will load the jps configuration file, persistence.xml. This file has all the metadata needed to bootstrap the jpa-LiTE framework. The information pertaining to a specific persistence unit extracted from this file, will be kept in this class.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
